name:
GOOD FRIDAY
THE PASSION OF THE LORD

lectionary.gospelTitle: The Passion of Our Lord Jesus Christ (Jn 18–19)
lectionary.thematicTag: Good Friday — The Passion of the Lord

readings.summary: The servant of the Lord shall prosper.

readings.citation:
Ps 31:2, 6, 12-13, 15-16, 17, 25
Father, into your hands I commend my spirit.
readings.antiphon: Father, into your hands I commend my spirit.

antiphons.text:
One of the soldiers opened his side with a lance,
and immediately Blood and water flowed out.

planningNotes: FRI 7 PM — single combined celebration, no Mass
Adoration of the Holy Cross with Veneration follows Intercessions
No consecration — pre-sanctified hosts from Holy Thursday

massNotes: Chant before Gospel: Through His Sacrifice We Are Freed (Lockwood, SATB, BPM 80) — also used as acclamation during Passion reading
Gospel with sung acclamation — John's full Passion narrative (Jn 18:1—19:42)
Solemn Intercessions: Hold Us, Jesus (Chris de Silva, SATB, BPM 60, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Offertory Chant: Lamb of God What Wondrous Love (Faure/Kane/Petker, BPM 76, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Adoration of Holy Cross Acclamation: Behold the Wood (Dan Schutte, SATB, Choral Dir: Tica)
Veneration: Ave Verum (Mozart, SATB, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Veneration: Pieta (Kendzia/Donohoo, SATB, BPM 58, Choral Dir: Tica) — alt: Crux Fidelis (Warner, Choral Dir: Merrick)

Behold the Cross (Bob Hurd, BPM 84, Choral Dir: Tica) — only if needed; alt: Sunday Is Coming (Phil Wickham, Choral Dir: Arielle), At The Cross Love Ran Red (Chris Tomlin, BPM 73, Choral Dir: Arielle)

responsorialPsalm.psalm: Ps 31 My Life Is in Your Hands

offertory.title: Lamb of God, What Wondrous Love

communionSongs.title: Pietà
communionSongs.description: BPM 58 — alt: Crux Fidelis (Steven C. Warner)

communionSongs.title: Behold the Cross
communionSongs.description: BPM 84 — alt: Sunday Is Coming (Phil Wickham), At The Cross Love Ran Red (Chris Tomlin, BPM 73)
